THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMS, CHARLES E., NORTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA TRUSTEE IN BANKRUPTCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, BENNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 747 NINETEENTH AVE. UNIT ONE S.F. CA. $3,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION OF POSSESSION IS STAYED UNTIL 5:00 PM ON 12/31/00, $3000 LIN SHALL PAY TO PLTF. WHICH AMOUNT REPRESENTS ALL UNPAID RENT, DAMAGES, FEES AND COSTS DEMANDED BY PLTF. IN HIS COMPLAINT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
